channel.title: moc on errbufferoverlf.me
channel.description: Recent content in moc on errbufferoverlf.me

item.title: The Antilibrary
item.description: a scholar conscious of the power of [their] antilibrary is not concerned with treating knowledge as a property to possess or consume; rather […] how much you don’t know—and how to find out that information when you need it.

item.title: The Soapbox
item.description: 2021 September [[notes/Collapsology Why your biggest threat isn’t exposed RDP|Collapsology Why your biggest threat isn’t exposed RDP]] 2019 November [[notes/The Big Cloud Security Debate Hackers vs Security Engineers|The Big Cloud Security Debate Hackers vs Security Engineers]]
